description: Upper part of a will in which the husband of Sutayt bt. Nadiv clarifies that half of the house in which he lives belongs to his wife, as well as the jewelry that has been given as collateral to Yosef Ibn Nufayʿ in Fustat against a loan of 150 nuqra dirhams; "it must be ransomed with the money of the orphans." Lastly, the female slave named Nasrīn [belongs to Sutayt]. (Information from Goitein's index card and from Med Soc III, p. 255 n. 35.) Goitein's index card states that the hand resembles that of ʿImmanuel b. Yeḥiʾel, but the handwriting comparison doesn't seem to match.
tags: Immanuel b. Yehiel, widow, jewelry, collateral, 13th c, slaves, will
description_he: חלק עליון של צוואה שבה בעל סוטיית בת נדיב מבהיר שמחצית הבית שגר בו שייכת לאשתו, וכן התכשיטים שנתנו כבטוחה ליוסף אבן נופייע ב-150 דרהמי נוקרה. השפחה נסרין שייכת לסוטיית.
